testcase.classname: employee request and shift screens claims an open shift from the detail screen

testcase.classname: AnnouncementCard snapshot matches the stable card snapshot
testcase.name: AnnouncementCard snapshot matches the stable card snapshot

testcase.classname: validation helpers accepts overnight open-shift windows but rejects zero-length windows
testcase.name: validation helpers accepts overnight open-shift windows but rejects zero-length windows

testcase.classname: validation helpers rejects short reasons and missing fields
testcase.name: validation helpers rejects short reasons and missing fields

testcase.classname: api client resilience reuses a single refresh flow when multiple requests hit 401 together
testcase.name: api client resilience reuses a single refresh flow when multiple requests hit 401 together

testcase.classname: api client resilience surfaces request timeouts as actionable API errors
testcase.name: api client resilience surfaces request timeouts as actionable API errors
